description: Ruby service app — interactor-like pattern, module mixins, concerns (included/class_methods), DSL (validates, attr_*)
known_limitations: Constant over-detection: module/class references in scope resolution (Services::CreateOrder, Concerns::Trackable) are detected as Constant symbols — 36 Constants vs 15 Modules, many are duplicates
include/extend not detected as relationships: 'include Concerns::Trackable' does not create an IMPORTS or IMPLEMENTS relationship to the module
Organizer STEPS chain (Services::CreateOrder, Services::UpdateInventory, Services::SendReceipt) not detected as CALLS — array constant references are not resolved
validates DSL not detected: 'validates :name, :email' is a method call but not resolved to Validatable.validates
delegate pattern not tested in this fixture
self.included(base) / base.extend(ClassMethods) pattern recognized as method definitions but the mixin relationship is not captured
singleton_method (self.call, self.find) correctly detected as Method but 'self.' qualifier is lost in the name
